The Residence

The largest of the one-bedroom homes — a ground-floor residence wrapped by a deep loggia and a private terrace of almost twenty-six square metres. Glazing draws the living space out toward the terracotta village and the sea air, with the pool, beach and tennis courts a short walk away. Indoor and outdoor living in equal measure, set into the curve of Manastiri Bay.

Floor Plan
